evals.expected_output: Ranked list showing worktree-stripe-refactor as best match, with path, branch name, last commit, and dirty status. Asks user to confirm before navigating.

evals.prompt: wt:find "the auth thing from last week"
evals.expected_output: Ranked list showing worktree with JWT/auth-related commits from ~7 days ago as best match. Semantic reasoning over commit messages, not just keyword match.

evals.prompt: wt:find "that branch with the broken tests"
evals.expected_output: Ranked list prioritizing worktrees with dirty test files or recent commits mentioning test failures. Shows dirty file list prominently.
